# text-flow — Basic _(Angular)_

```js
import { TextFlowComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/text-flow';
```

```html
<lu-text-flow>
	<h1>Heading 1</h1>
	<h2>Heading 2</h2>
	<p>Paragraph</p>
	<p>Paragraph</p>
	<h2>Heading 2</h2>
	<p>Paragraph</p>
	<ul>
		<li>List item</li>
		<li>List item</li>
		<li>List item</li>
	</ul>
	<h3>Heading 3</h3>
	<p>Paragraph</p>
	<h4>Heading 4</h4>
	<ol>
		<li>List item</li>
		<li>List item</li>
		<li>List item</li>
	</ol>
</lu-text-flow>
```
